parse.title: Blue Dragon Film Award for Best Film

wikitext.*:
{{Short description|Blue Dragon Film Awards in South Korea}} {{Use mdy dates|date=November 2021}} {{Infobox award | name = Blue Dragon Film Award for Best Film | image = | caption = The 2025 recipient: ''[[No Other Choice]]'' | awarded_for = Best Film | presenter = [[Blue Dragon Film Awards]] | country = [[South Korea]] | year = 1963 | year2 = | winner = ''[[No Other Choice]]'' | website = {{URL|http://www.blueaward.co.kr/}} }} The '''Blue Dragon Film Award for Best Film''' is one of the awards that is presented annually at the [[Blue Dragon Film Awards]] by ''[[The Chosun Ilbo|Sports Chosun]]'', which is typically held at the end of the year.{{cite news |last1=Im |first1=Eun-byel |title=Blue Dragon Film Awards to be held on Feb. 9 |url=https://www.koreaherald.com/view.php?ud=20210119000982 |access-date=April 24, 2021 |work=[[The Korea Herald]] |date=January 19, 2021}} == Winners and nominees == {| class="wikitable" |+Table key | style="background:#FAEB86; height:20px; width:20px" |{{double dagger|alt=Award winner}} |Indicates the winner |} === 1960s{{anchor|1970}} === {| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;" ! style="width:5%;" |Year ! style="width:25%;" |Winner ! style="width:25%;" |Original title ! style="width:20%;" |Director(s) |- !
